title: Torah among the gentiles via the Messiah? Scripture? Spiritual prophecy / revelation?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: - Is there a cohesive vision of Torah being performed in the land of the gentiles to be recovered in Scripture? - only among gentiles where Moshe was preached? - where Israel / Jews are present?  - is
body:
- Is there a cohesive vision of Torah being performed in the land of the gentiles to be recovered in Scripture?
- only among gentiles where Moshe was preached?
- where Israel / Jews are present? 
- is there a vision for Torah being performed in the nations of the gentiles by the gentiles themselves presented in Scripture?
content:
- Is there a cohesive vision of Torah being performed in the land of the gentiles to be recovered in Scripture?
- only among gentiles where Moshe was preached?
- where Israel / Jews are present? 
- is there a vision for Torah being performed in the nations of the gentiles by the gentiles themselves presented in Scripture?
